results.why: This pass tightens [[Atraxa, Praetors' Voice]] around smoother four-color mana, scalable ramp, and cleaner interaction at a casual power level. The added tri-lands and utility lands make the mana base more reliable, while the new protection and counters help key permanents survive. Cuts mostly remove color-identity issues, excess basics, and a few draw spells that are less efficient for this broader refinement.

added.arcane sanctum: [[Arcane Sanctum]] improves fixing for three of Atraxa's four colors in one land slot.

added.swan song: [[Swan Song]] gives cheap interaction to protect your board or stop key spells.
added.teferi's protection: [[Teferi's Protection]] is a premium safeguard for your board and life total.

results.summary: Transformed: Mana base improvement. Power Casual, budget Moderate. Avg CMC ~3.34.
results.why: This pass improves [[Atraxa, Praetors' Voice]]'s mana base by replacing excess basics and a few lower-priority spells with more multicolor lands and cheaper fixing. The added lands increase color coverage for a four-color Commander deck, while the talismans and [[Fellwar Stone]] help accelerate and smooth early turns. It also removes an off-color card and trims some mana sinks to keep the deck focused on stable casting.

added.prairie stream: [[Prairie Stream]] strengthens dual-color access and can enter untapped with enough basics.

added.talisman of progress: [[Talisman of Progress]] accelerates mana while covering white and blue early.
added.talisman of resilience: [[Talisman of Resilience]] provides low-cost ramp and smooth black-green access.

added.blighted woodland: [[Blighted Woodland]] turns a land slot into repeatable ramp without hurting color identity.
added.cultivate: [[Cultivate]] improves land drops while fixing both colors consistently.
added.farseek: [[Farseek]] efficiently finds dual lands to stabilize black and green mana.
added.golgari rot farm: [[Golgari Rot Farm]] provides both colors from one land slot and helps hit land count.
added.kodama's reach: [[Kodama's Reach]] adds dependable ramp and color smoothing for slower casual games.
added.myriad landscape: [[Myriad Landscape]] gives a land-based way to ramp without spending spell slots.
added.nature's lore: [[Nature's Lore]] accelerates mana while fetching key Forest-based fixing.
added.necroblossom snarl: [[Necroblossom Snarl]] is a low-cost dual land that improves early color access.
added.nurturing peatland: [[Nurturing Peatland]] fixes both colors early and can cash in for a card later.
added.rampant growth: [[Rampant Growth]] is simple, reliable ramp that helps smooth the early game.
added.reflecting pool: [[Reflecting Pool]] becomes strong flexible fixing once any colored source is online.
added.skyshroud claim: [[Skyshroud Claim]] ramps hard and can find Forest duals for better fixing.
added.tainted wood: [[Tainted Wood]] is an efficient dual land once black mana is established.
added.temple of malady: [[Temple of Malady]] improves color consistency and adds a useful scry.
added.three visits: [[Three Visits]] gives another cheap land-ramp spell to improve tempo and fixing.
added.twilight mire: [[Twilight Mire]] helps convert awkward draws into the exact colors needed.
added.undergrowth stadium: [[Undergrowth Stadium]] is a strong untapped dual in most Commander games.

removed.forest: Extra [[Forest]] copies were trimmed to make room for stronger fixing and ramp.
removed.swamp: Extra [[Swamp]] copies were reduced because dual lands and ramp now cover color needs better.
removed.beast whisperer: [[Beast Whisperer]] is powerful, but this pass prioritized mana infrastructure over card advantage.
removed.coat of arms: [[Coat of Arms]] was cut to free space for consistency upgrades in the mana base.
removed.damnation: [[Damnation]] was removed to make room for cards that directly improve mana development.
removed.deadly rollick: [[Deadly Rollick]] was trimmed as part of shifting nonland slots into fixing and ramp.
removed.deathrite shaman: [[Deathrite Shaman]] is less reliable ramp here than dedicated land-based acceleration.
removed.door of destinies: [[Door of Destinies]] was cut because tribal payoff was deprioritized for mana consistency.
removed.ezuri, claw of progress: [[Ezuri, Claw of Progress]] is outside [[Lathril, Blade of the Elves]]'s color identity.
removed.harmonize: [[Harmonize]] was removed to open a slot for more direct mana smoothing.
removed.herald's horn: [[Herald's Horn]] is useful tribal support, but this pass focused on fixing first.
removed.reliquary tower: [[Reliquary Tower]] does not fix colors, so it was replaced by stronger colored sources.
removed.shared animosity: [[Shared Animosity]] is outside [[Lathril, Blade of the Elves]]'s color identity.
removed.urza's incubator: [[Urza's Incubator]] was trimmed to prioritize lands and ramp over cost-reduction.
removed.vanquisher's banner: [[Vanquisher's Banner]] was cut because the deck needed better mana more than another payoff.
